context_for_next_testing_agent: Journey page UI polish testing complete. All 8 visual refinements verified: (1) Header shadow, (2) Signal chips reduced weight, (3) Hero title prominence, (4) Urgency line readability, (5) Message preview softened, (6) CTA button enlarged with glow, (7) Metadata pills reduced dominance, (8) Hero card depth, (9) FAB anchoring with top shadow and blur. Both Stanford (/pipeline/cd5c0908-c3ea-49d1-8a5f-d57d18f32116) and Emory (/pipeline/73b354dd-5759-45f2-bd63-92346dad8496) journey pages tested successfully.
